business_question: Which brands contribute the highest percentage of overall sales?
business_context: Executives want to understand brand concentration and identify strategic revenue drivers.
sql_answer:
WITH brand_sales AS (
SELECT
p.BRAND,
SUM(s.NET_UNITS_SOLD) AS SALES
FROM FACT_SALES s
JOIN DIM_PRODUCT p
ON s.PRODUCT_KEY = p.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY p.BRAND
)
SELECT
BRAND,
SALES,
ROUND(
SALES * 100.0 /
SUM(SALES) OVER (),
2
) AS SALES_SHARE_PCT
FROM brand_sales
ORDER BY SALES_SHARE_PCT DESC;
